summary: Site is healthy: GitHub Pages reports status=built, repo index.html is valid (44KB, all tabs present, no placeholders, yesterday date). One WARNING escalated: the daily agent pushed 3 duplicate commits within 3 seconds at 00:14 UTC, triggering 2 consecutive build failures before recovery. No auto-fix applied (issue requires daily agent code change). GitHub issue #9 filed.
